title: Lesson 90
paragraph: This lesson practices useful nouns for jobs and workplaces.

words.meaning: a place where people work at desks
words.example: My father works in an office.

words.meaning: a place where people make things
a time when people talk about work or plans

words.example: The manager helps the new worker.

words.meaning: a person who does a job
words.example: Every worker wears a name card.

words.meaning: the people who work at a place
special clothes for work or school
words.example: The staff wear a blue uniform.

words.meaning: something used to do or make things
words.example: This tool is useful for fixing bikes.

words.meaning: a thing with parts that does work
words.example: The machine makes a loud sound.

words.meaning: a short rest from work or school
words.example: We have a break at three.
